error.capacity_details: bezwen %d bit, kapasite maksimòm nan k=1 se %d bit
error.empty_coefficients: Tranch koyefisyan an pa ka vid
error.header_embed_failed: echwe pou entegre antet mesaj la: %v
error.insufficient_capacity: mesaj la twò gwo pou kapasite koyefisyan ki disponib la
error.insufficient_coefficients: koyefisyan ensifizan pandan entegrasyon an: bezwen %d, jwenn %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: koyefisyan itilizab ensifizan pou entegre header la: bezwen 32 bit, yo jwenn sèlman %d koyefisyan itilizab
error.invalid_code_word: mo kòd la pa ka vid
error.invalid_coefficient_range: valè koyefisyan an pa nan limit valab la (-2048 rive 2047)
error.invalid_force_k: ForceK ki pa valab: dwe 0 (otomatik) oubyen 1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: Paramèt k a dwe ant 1 ak 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: Kodaj matris la echwe pou mo kòd la: %v
error.message_too_large: Gwosè mesaj la depase maksimòm otorize a (8,388,607 okte)
error.nil_random_source: sous o aza a pa ka nil: itilize InitializePRNG(modpas) oubyen bay yon RandomSource pre-deziyen

log.shrinkage_detected: Yo detekte yon kontraksyon, y ap re-entegre bit la
